_comment: DSP Scope hero demo: one 200 ms time axis with three choreographed scopes for a 15–20 s landscape screen recording. Stage Playback auto-advances the cursor; each widget renders a cursor-anchored window so the whole choreography plays back synchronized. These are LIGHT anchors (a demo asset, not a per-frame snapshot). Regenerate with dart run tool/generate_dsp_demo_fixture.dart (writes both trees).

spectrum.note: Chirp sweeps 3000 Hz → 30000 Hz (f 0→0.5) and back (f 0.5→1); steady harmonics at 10000 Hz and 20000 Hz. Peak bin slides up then down; assert peakBin(up-ramp) > peakBin(near-start).

iq.note: Clean QPSK (4 clusters) → 16-QAM (16 clusters) → noise bloom → clears; a slow 0.75-turn rotation spins the plot. Ideal-QAM grid overlay is on; fixed axis [-1.15, 1.15].

eye.note: Jitter + amplitude noise + ISI ramp up to a peak at f≈0.5 then ramp down. Eye is OPEN near the start (f≈0.06) and CLOSED at mid-timeline (f≈0.5). Assert measureEye is open at the start anchor and its height shrinks (or closes) at the mid anchor.
